banner-github-svg.description: 1280x320 banner SVG with Everforest dark palette, serif title typography, inline fill/font attributes for GitHub compatibility

lifecycle-flow-svg.description: Horizontal flow diagram (~1280x200) showing init -> start-set -> discuss -> plan -> execute -> review -> merge pipeline

agent-dispatch-svg.description: Vertical tree diagram (~1280x600) showing command-to-agent spawning relationships

social-preview-png.description: 1280x640 social preview PNG rasterized from banner design via rsvg-convert

gitattributes.description: Git attributes marking PNG as binary, SVG as text, with diff settings

github-svg-compat.description: All SVGs must use inline fill/font attributes instead of CSS classes or font declarations, because GitHub's SVG sanitizer and camo proxy strip them

wcag-aa-compliance.description: Grey #859289 used only for large text (>=18px or >=14px bold) to maintain WCAG AA contrast ratio against dark backgrounds

title-as-paths.description: Banner title text converted to SVG paths to avoid font rendering failures on systems without Georgia/Noto Serif

definition.scope: Create all four visual branding assets (banner SVG, lifecycle flow SVG, agent dispatch SVG, social preview PNG) plus .gitattributes. All SVGs hand-crafted with inline attributes for GitHub rendering compatibility.

tasks.description: Create 1280x320 banner SVG with Everforest dark palette and path-based title
tasks.acceptance: Renders correctly on GitHub without font fallback issues

tasks.description: Create horizontal lifecycle flow SVG showing init-to-merge pipeline

tasks.acceptance: 1280x640 PNG with readable text, generated via rsvg-convert

acceptance: All 4 visual assets exist and render correctly on GitHub
